title: Chainsaw Craft (CSM)
description: A Mod Based On Chainsaw Man
body:
## This mod aims to add the Chainsaw Man world to Minecraft. 

Currently there is Pochita, a Chainsaw Man and a Katana Man transformation for the player. A Dash system, a Parry and a Block system and a Skill system with moves unlockable by leveling up or having contracts.

Have fun !!!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commands and gamerules:
-  **/chainsawcraft   add_skill**       ---  add a skill
- **/chainsawcraft   contract**        ---  add/remove a contract or get your contract
- **/chainsawcraft   reset_skills**   ---  reset all of your skills
- **/chainsawcraft   stats**                 ---  set your stats (Speed/Strength/Vitality)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Dependencies:
-  Player Animator
-  Kleider
-   Geckolib

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you make a video on the mod tell me on discord, I will put a link to the video on the mod page.

The Discord if you find bugs or if you have any suggestions: 
https://discord.gg/3TXXQvR4qX
